content.facebook:
Shoutout to the incredible swim community pushing limits across New Zealand every single day. From early morning club sessions in Auckland to open water training on the Coromandel coast, Kiwi swimmers are some of the most dedicated athletes in the world — and we are proud to be part of your journey.

This week we have been hearing from swimmers and triathletes around the country about their upcoming race season goals. Whether you are chasing a personal best at your next club meet, preparing for your first sprint triathlon, or representing your region at nationals, that relentless drive to improve is what unites this community.

At Velocx NZ, every suit we bring you is crafted in Italy with exactly that competitive spirit in mind. Precision construction, advanced Italian fabrics, and a fit engineered to reduce drag and free your body to move at its best. Because when you have put in the training, you deserve gear that keeps up.

Tag a training partner below who deserves a shoutout, and share your race season goals in the comments. Let us know what you are working toward this autumn — we love following your progress.

Keep pushing, New Zealand. The water is waiting.

#VelocxNZ #CompetitiveSwimwear #ItalianSwimwear #SwimFast #EliteSwimwear #NewZealandSwimming #SwimNZ #Triathlon #PoolPerformance
